pageContext.name: Three Eyed Raven 1oz Silver Medallion
pageContext.description: The all-knowing and all-seeing Three Eyed Raven features on the second medallion in the Game of Thrones™ Collection! An ancient and immensely powerful being, the Three Eyed Raven could perceive the past, present and future through visions and time travel with ease.   Created in partnership with Warner Bros. Consumer Products, this 1oz silver medallion is shaped as a square badge. On one side, there is the engraving of the mysterious being in his raven form. The other side includes the engraved words All men must die and the Game of Thrones logo. Further engraving along the bottom confirms the medallion as a full 1oz of .999 fine silver and includes the HBO copyright for authentication.   The medallion arrives nestled in black velvet that is placed inside a custom-designed box to complement this special collectible.   Be the envy of all Game of Thrones fans with this unique collectible. Order today!
